datumNote: clearanceM values are metres above HAT per MSQ Beacon to Beacon convention — actual clearance at any tide below HAT is greater, so gating airDraft > clearanceM is conservative-safe

bridges.name: Kay Cottee Bridge — Griffith Rd (Newport canal)
bridges.source: MSQ Beacon to Beacon Moreton Bay, map MB-6 + Newport Marina enlargement (5.5 m above HAT)

bridges.name: Klingner Road footbridge (Newport canal)
bridges.source: owner local knowledge 2026-07-02: pedestrian bridge, 'pressed to get a tender under it' — ~1.0 m; no published value exists

bridges.source: owner local knowledge 2026-07-02: pedestrian bridge, 'pressed to get a tender under it' — ~1.0 m; no published value exists

bridges.source: MSQ Beacon to Beacon Sunshine Coast, map SC-5 (0.7 m above HAT); span from adjacent OSM cycleway bridge

bridges.name: McKenzie Bridge — Nicklin Way over old Mooloolah channel
bridges.source: MSQ Beacon to Beacon Sunshine Coast, map SC-5 (2.3 m above HAT); span from OSM bridge way

bridges.name: Old Mooloolah channel crossing W of McKenzie Bridge
bridges.source: MSQ Beacon to Beacon Sunshine Coast, map SC-5 (2.7 m above HAT); SPAN APPROXIMATE (no OSM bridge way — 60 m N-S bar at the published position)

bridges.name: Parrearra Channel footbridge (N of Parrearra Lock & Weir)
bridges.source: MSQ Beacon to Beacon Sunshine Coast, maps SC-5/SC-6 (3.6 m above HAT); SPAN APPROXIMATE (60 m E-W bar at the published position); note the adjacent Lock & Weir gates all access to the Kawana Waters system regardless

bridges.name: Parrearra Lock & Weir (Kawana Waters)
bridges.source: MSQ B2B SC-5/SC-6: the Lock & Weir gates ALL access between the Parrearra Channel and the Kawana Waters lake system — no free transit for routing purposes. Modelled as zero clearance so any vessel with an air draft set is barred; the 2026-07-02 device regression routed a 55-ft yacht through the lock as if it were open water.
